auth.have_account: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.first_login_notice: This is your first login — please choose a new password before continuing.
auth.password_too_short: New password must be at least 6 characters.
dashboard.title: Upcoming Matches
dashboard.predicted_tip: You've already submitted a prediction for this match.
match.locked_msg: Predictions are locked — match has begun.
match.exact_score_hint: Optional — leave blank to skip. The +2 bonus is only awarded when BOTH your winner pick AND the exact score are correct. If your winner is wrong, a correct score gives 0.
match.score_pair_required: Fill both score boxes or leave both empty.
match.thanks_sub: Your prediction has been saved. Good luck!
match.trivia_timeout: Time's up! You can no longer answer this question.
match.trivia_locked: Trivia is closed — the match has started.
match.trivia_author_block: You created this question — only other players can answer it.
leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
profile.title: My Predictions
profile.no_predictions: You haven't made any predictions yet.
profile.no_trivia: You haven't answered any trivia yet.
profile.tip_exact: +2 bonus — only awarded when BOTH your winner pick AND the exact final score are correct. A correct score with a wrong winner gives 0.
profile.tip_winner: Main prediction — pick home win, draw, or away win.
profile.tip_first_scorer: Your picked first goal scorer matches the real one.
profile.tip_motm: Your picked Man of the Match matches the real one.
profile.tip_trivia: Correct answer to the Arabic trivia question.
admin.title: Admin
admin.result_saved_pending: Result saved. Click Calc Points to award points.
admin.already_calculated_by: Already calculated by {who}. Only they can recalculate.
admin.refresh_tip: Pull the latest statuses and scores from football-data.org. Manually-entered scores are preserved.
admin.refresh_done: Refresh complete: {statuses} status changes, {scores} new scores from API.
admin.trivia_delete_confirm: Delete this trivia question? All user answers will be removed too.
admin.trivia_locked_new: Can't add a question — this match has already started.
admin.bonus_help: Use this column to add or subtract points manually (e.g. to backfill predictions on matches that finished before this app launched). The number replaces the previous bonus; it doesn't add to it. The total in the rightmost column already includes this bonus.
admin.bank_how_works_text: Each user gets one random question per match. The moment a question is handed to a user, it is removed from the bank so no two users get the same one. Their answer is saved on the match-trivia row.
admin.bank_reseeded: Question bank refreshed from JSON files.
admin.bank_reseed_tip: Reads every *.json file under questions/ and adds any new questions (duplicates by text are skipped).
